title: crotalaria durandiana
intro: Crotalaria durandiana, also known as Durand's rattle pod, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria durandiana include its use in treating various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria durandiana is often used as a tea or infused oil, and its seeds are sometimes used to make a powder for topical application.
